spam_error: Spam detected. Please fill the form calmly.
about_p1: The house Posta Veglia (built in 1792) in Sils-Baselgia is a listed building. Located in the immediate vicinity of Lake Sils and the Nietzsche House, it offers the ideal starting point for hiking and skiing in the Engadine.
about_p2: The pine-paneled living room is comfortably heated from the kitchen by an old Engadine stove. A small wooden staircase leads to the bedrooms above.
about_p3: Modern bathrooms offer the desired comfort for up to nine people in this historic ambience.
preise_p1: Posta Veglia can generally be rented from Saturday to Saturday.
preise_p2: The rental price includes firewood, bed linen, visitor tax, and internet. Final cleaning is CHF 250.-.
kontakt_q_text: Would you like to rent Posta Veglia? Then please fill out the contact form.
modal_wz_p1: The pine-paneled living room is heated from the kitchen. The long dining table offers space for up to 12 people.
seo_description: Rent the Posta Veglia holiday home in Sils-Baselgia. Heritage-protected Engadine house for 7-9 people.
form_success: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.
form_error: Sorry, there was a problem sending your message.

alt_haus: Historic Engadine house Posta Veglia in Sils-Baselgia
datenschutz_text:
1. Data protection at a glance

The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website.

2. Data collection on this website

Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. Their contact details can be found in the legal notice.

3. Google Analytics (with anonymized IP)

This website uses Google Analytics. We have activated IP anonymization, so your IP address is shortened by Google within the EU before being transmitted to the USA.

4. Google Maps & Web Fonts

For uniform display and site visualization, this site uses Web Fonts and Google Maps.

5. Your Rights

You have the right to receive information about the origin, recipient and purpose of your stored personal data.
